project.name: memberbase
project.description: A self-hosted membership and donor management web application for small associations. Built on PHP 8.2 / MariaDB with an htmx + Alpine.js frontend and a JSON REST API.

nodes.name: user_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the User entity class that loads, holds, and persists a single member record including personal data, team memberships, and accounting queries.

nodes.name: compta_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the Compta entity class representing a single accounting entry with CRUD operations against the compta table.

nodes.name: metagroup_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the Metagroup entity class for filter groups (group-of-groups), supporting lookup, save, and removal with dependency checks.

nodes.name: property_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the UserProperty entity class representing a single user attribute or suivi entry stored in the user_properties table.

nodes.name: team_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the Team entity class representing a group record with metagroup membership management and usage checks before removal.

nodes.name: bootstrap.php
nodes.summary: Application bootstrap that establishes the PDO database connection, loads compta types and app settings into globals, defines virtual filter constants, and provides shared utility functions.

nodes.name: auth.php
nodes.summary: Authentication helpers managing PHP session lifecycle, login/logout, CSRF-safe cookie settings, role checks, and access guards for protected pages.

nodes.name: schema.sql
nodes.summary: Full idempotent MariaDB schema defining all application tables: users, team, user_properties, metagroup, compta, compta_type, maxval, app_settings, app_users, and audit_log.

nodes.name: resources_fr.php
nodes.summary: French locale file providing all UI display strings as a flat $GLOBAL array for labels, navigation, actions, and form fields.

nodes.name: User
nodes.summary: Member entity with full CRUD, team membership helpers, and accounting query methods (isCotisationPayed, hasDonated, etc.).

nodes.name: Compta
nodes.summary: Accounting entry entity with lookupCompta, save (insert/update), and remove methods.

nodes.name: Metagroup
nodes.summary: Filter-group entity with lookup, save (using updateAndGetMaxVal for new IDs), isUsed check, and remove.

nodes.name: UserProperty
nodes.summary: User attribute/suivi entity with lookup, save (using updateAndGetMaxVal for new IDs), and remove.

nodes.name: Team
nodes.summary: Group entity with metagroup membership management methods and an isUsed guard before removal.

nodes.name: getMaxVal
nodes.summary: Reads or initializes a sequence counter value from the maxval table for a named parameter.

nodes.name: updateAndGetMaxVal
nodes.summary: Increments and returns the next sequence value from maxval, used as a manual auto-increment for metagroup and user_properties IDs.

nodes.name: formatedDateToTimeStamp
nodes.summary: Parses a d/m/Y date string to a Unix timestamp.

nodes.name: timeStampToformatedDate
nodes.summary: Formats a Unix timestamp to a d/m/Y display string.

nodes.name: unquote
nodes.summary: Replaces typographic apostrophes with straight apostrophes in user input.

nodes.name: auditLog
nodes.summary: Inserts an audit log entry recording the acting app user, action, detail, and optional subject member.

nodes.name: authUser
nodes.summary: Returns an object with the current session user's id, username, display_name, role, and force_password_change flag, or null if not logged in.

nodes.name: isLoggedIn
nodes.summary: Returns true if a user session is active.

nodes.name: isAdmin
nodes.summary: Returns true if the current session user has the admin role.

nodes.name: isManager
nodes.summary: Returns true if the current session user has admin or manager role.

nodes.name: canWrite
nodes.summary: Returns true if the current session user has admin, manager, or user role.

nodes.name: requireLogin
nodes.summary: Redirects to login.php and exits if no user is logged in.

nodes.name: requirePasswordChange
nodes.summary: Redirects to the changePassword view if the session flag force_password_change is set.

nodes.name: authLogin
nodes.summary: Verifies credentials against app_users, regenerates session ID on success, and stores user data in session.

nodes.name: authLogout
nodes.summary: Clears and destroys the current session and removes the session cookie.

nodes.name: users
nodes.summary: Member records table with personal info fields, status flag, and indexes on lastname/firstname/status.

nodes.name: team
nodes.summary: Groups table with name and hidden flag.

nodes.name: user_properties
nodes.summary: Key-value property bag for members, also used to store team memberships as parameter='team_{id}'.

nodes.name: metagroup
nodes.summary: Smart filter groups table; rows with name set are headers, rows with teamid set are member-team links.

nodes.name: compta
nodes.summary: Accounting entries table linking members to payment records with type, date, sum, and attestation flag.

nodes.name: compta_type
nodes.summary: Accounting entry type definitions with cotisation, donation-exclusion, and institutional flags.

nodes.name: app_users
nodes.summary: Application user accounts with hashed passwords, roles, active flag, and password-reset token fields.

nodes.name: audit_log
nodes.summary: Activity log recording every significant action with actor, action type, detail, and subject member.

nodes.name: maxval
nodes.summary: Manual sequence counter table used for metagroup and user_properties IDs.

nodes.name: app_settings
nodes.summary: Key-value application configuration table for org info, default teams, and other settings.

nodes.name: _bootstrap.php
nodes.summary: Shared bootstrap for all API endpoints: sets JSON content-type header, initializes DB/session, enforces authentication guard, and provides the apiError helper.

nodes.name: members.php
nodes.summary: REST API endpoint for member (user) records supporting CRUD operations with pagination, search, team/metagroup filtering, and virtual filters for lapsed/unpaid members.

nodes.name: compta.php
nodes.summary: REST API endpoint for accounting entries (compta), supporting full CRUD with type validation, audit logging, and optional year filtering on list.

nodes.name: compta-types.php
nodes.summary: Read-only REST API endpoint returning all accounting types ordered by sort_order and label.

nodes.name: groups.php
nodes.summary: REST API endpoint for group (team) management including listing, creating, renaming, deleting groups and managing member membership within groups.

nodes.name: suivi.php
nodes.summary: REST API endpoint for follow-up (suivi) notes attached to members, supporting full CRUD with audit logging.

nodes.name: actions.php
nodes.summary: Routes incoming action requests (POST) to the appropriate action handler file using a static dispatch map covering members, groups, metagroups, settings, compta, suivi, and auth.

nodes.name: views.php
nodes.summary: Dispatches view requests to the appropriate view template includes, handling member CRUD views, compta views, suivi views, settings views, and legacy redirects.

nodes.name: index.php
nodes.summary: Application entry point that handles both full HTML page renders and htmx partial fragment responses, bootstrapping auth, classes, routing, and all frontend assets including htmx, Alpine.js, Bootstrap, DataTables, and the dirty-form guard.

nodes.name: GET /api/members
nodes.summary: List members with pagination, optional search, team/metagroup filter, and virtual filters for lapsed/unpaid subsets.

nodes.name: GET /api/members/{id}
nodes.summary: Retrieve a single member record by ID.

nodes.name: GET /api/members/{id}/groups
nodes.summary: List all groups a member belongs to, with category information.

nodes.name: POST /api/members
nodes.summary: Create a new member record; requires write permission.

nodes.name: PUT /api/members/{id}
nodes.summary: Update an existing member record with diff-based audit logging; requires write permission.

nodes.name: DELETE /api/members/{id}
nodes.summary: Deactivate (default) or permanently delete a member; permanent delete requires admin role.

nodes.name: GET /api/compta
nodes.summary: List accounting entries for a given memberId, optionally filtered by year.

nodes.name: GET /api/compta/{id}
nodes.summary: Retrieve a single accounting entry by ID.

nodes.name: POST /api/compta
nodes.summary: Create a new accounting entry; requires write permission and valid typeId.

nodes.name: PUT /api/compta/{id}
nodes.summary: Update an existing accounting entry; requires write permission.

nodes.name: DELETE /api/compta/{id}
nodes.summary: Delete an accounting entry; requires write permission.

nodes.name: GET /api/compta-types
nodes.summary: Return all accounting types ordered by sort_order and label.

nodes.name: GET /api/groups
nodes.summary: List all groups with member count and category information.

nodes.name: GET /api/groups/{id}
nodes.summary: Retrieve a single group by ID with member count.

nodes.name: GET /api/groups/{id}/members
nodes.summary: List all active members belonging to a group.

nodes.name: POST /api/groups
nodes.summary: Create a new group; requires manager role.

nodes.name: PUT /api/groups/{id}
nodes.summary: Rename a group or toggle its hidden flag; requires manager role.

nodes.name: DELETE /api/groups/{id}
nodes.summary: Delete a group if it has no members; requires manager role.

nodes.name: POST /api/groups/{id}/members
nodes.summary: Add a member to a group; requires manager role.

nodes.name: DELETE /api/groups/{id}/members
nodes.summary: Remove a member from a group; requires manager role.

nodes.name: GET /api/suivi
nodes.summary: List follow-up notes for a given memberId, newest first.

nodes.name: GET /api/suivi/{id}
nodes.summary: Retrieve a single follow-up note by ID.

nodes.name: POST /api/suivi
nodes.summary: Create a new follow-up note for a member; requires write permission.

nodes.name: PUT /api/suivi/{id}
nodes.summary: Update a follow-up note; requires write permission.

nodes.name: DELETE /api/suivi/{id}
nodes.summary: Delete a follow-up note; requires write permission.

nodes.name: auth.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for authentication operations including logout, password change, and app user management (create, update, delete, reset password, flush audit log). Requires admin role for most operations.

nodes.name: members.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for member record management including add, update, merge, anonymize, deactivate, reactivate, and delete operations. Uses the User class and logs all changes to audit log.

nodes.name: compta.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for accounting entries: add new compta records, update existing ones, and toggle attestation flag. Uses the Compta class with full audit logging.

nodes.name: groups.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for group (team) management including create, rename, delete, reassign, bulk show/hide, import members from other groups or accounting data, and manage memberships. Requires manager role.

nodes.name: metagroups.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for metagroup (category/filter group) management including create, update, delete, reorder categories, and assign teams to metagroups. Uses the Metagroup class.

nodes.name: settings.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for application settings persistence and compta type management (add, update, delete, reorder). Admin required for settings, manager for compta type operations.

nodes.name: suivi.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for follow-up (suivi) entries on member records: add and update UserProperty records with date, parameter, and value. Full audit logging included.

nodes.name: login.php
nodes.summary: Login page handling credential validation with CSRF protection and session creation. Redirects authenticated users and forces password change if required.

nodes.name: set-password.php
nodes.summary: Token-based password setup page for new users invited by an admin. Validates invite token expiry and sets the user's initial password.

nodes.name: install.php
nodes.summary: 5-step web installer wizard: checks prerequisites, configures DB connection, runs schema SQL, seeds organisation settings and compta types, and creates the first admin account.

nodes.name: users_list.php
nodes.summary: Member list view with search, column sorting, and multi-filter navigation (by team, metagroup, or special filters like unpaid contributions). Supports AJAX search and bulk membership operations.

nodes.name: users_edit_form.php
nodes.summary: Tabbed member profile editor showing donation/contribution stats mini-dashboard and navigation to sub-views (generalData, compta, suivi, memberOf, history). Heavily queries compta and compta_type tables.

nodes.name: users_add_form.php
nodes.summary: Form for creating a new member record with full contact fields. Supports optional fromTeam parameter to auto-assign group after creation.

nodes.name: users_general_data.php
nodes.summary: Inline view/edit tab for a member's general contact data using Alpine.js and the PUT /api/members/{id} JSON API. Hover-to-edit pattern with no page reload.

nodes.name: users_history.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only tab showing a member's full activity and change history from the audit_log table, ordered by date descending.

nodes.name: users_inactive.php
nodes.summary: Lists all inactive (status=0) members with options to reactivate them or assign them to groups. Requires admin access.

nodes.name: users_merge.php
nodes.summary: UI and logic for merging two duplicate member records by selecting which fields to keep from each. Requires two valid user IDs via GET parameters.

nodes.name: users_anonymize.php
nodes.summary: GDPR-style anonymization confirmation screen for a member, showing their compta entry count before irreversibly wiping personal data.

nodes.name: users_member_of.php
nodes.summary: Handles add/remove membership toggle actions and renders the group membership panel for a member, with undo toast notifications.

nodes.name: donors_summary.php
nodes.summary: Dashboard summary of members, donations, and attestation figures for a selected year, with configurable minimum amount threshold and attestation inclusion toggle.

nodes.name: donors_new.php
nodes.summary: Lists first-time donors for a given year — members who gave in the selected year but had no prior donation history.

nodes.name: donors_loyal.php
nodes.summary: Lists loyal donors who gave consistently across multiple consecutive years, with year-over-year comparison.

nodes.name: donors_lapsed.php
nodes.summary: Lists donors who gave in a prior year but not in the selected year, identifying lapsed contributors.

nodes.name: members_lapsed.php
nodes.summary: Lists members whose membership lapsed compared to the previous year, based on team membership changes between years.

nodes.name: compta_list.php
nodes.summary: Generic accounting entries list with year filter, donation-only toggle, and per-type filtering. Displays all compta records across members.

nodes.name: compta_edit_form.php
nodes.summary: Form for creating or editing a single accounting entry linked to a member, supporting amount, date, type, and notes fields.

nodes.name: compta_last_entry.php
nodes.summary: Accounting entries list with advanced sorting, year/type filters, and attestation PDF link generation. Serves as the per-member compta tab.

nodes.name: suivi_list.php
nodes.summary: Form for adding a new follow-up (suivi) note entry to a member's record, posting to the addSuivi action.

nodes.name: suivi_edit_form.php
nodes.summary: Form for editing an existing follow-up entry, loading data via UserProperty and User lookups by suivi ID.

nodes.name: suivi_last_entry.php
nodes.summary: Global list of all members ordered by their most recent follow-up date, joining users and user_properties on the suivi parameter.

nodes.name: settings_general.php
nodes.summary: Main settings panel with tabbed navigation covering groups, filters, accounting types, and app configuration. Entry point for all settings sub-views.

nodes.name: settings_app_users.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only panel for managing application user accounts: listing, creating, editing roles, and resetting passwords.

nodes.name: settings_categories.php
nodes.summary: Admin UI for managing group categories (metagroup visual sections), listing all categories with their associated groups.

nodes.name: settings_groups.php
nodes.summary: Admin UI for listing and managing all groups (teams), showing member counts and category assignments, with links to per-group edit.

nodes.name: settings_group_edit.php
nodes.summary: Form for creating or editing a single group (team) with name, category, and visibility settings. Redirects to settings on invalid ID.

nodes.name: settings_compta_types.php
nodes.summary: Admin UI for managing accounting entry types with color coding, cotisation flag, donation exclusion flag, and sort order.

nodes.name: settings_filters.php
nodes.summary: Admin UI for listing navigation filters (is_filter=1 metagroups) that group multiple teams into dynamic filters in the navbar.

nodes.name: settings_filter_edit.php
nodes.summary: Form for creating or editing a metagroup used as a navigation filter, with team assignment management.

nodes.name: settings_integrity.php
nodes.summary: Admin tool for detecting data integrity issues including duplicate members by name and links to the merge tool for resolution.

nodes.name: settings_audit_log.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only view of the full audit_log table with optional flush/cleanup action for old entries.

nodes.name: auth_change_password.php
nodes.summary: Password change form supporting both voluntary change and forced password-change flow (force_password_change flag). Delegates action to the auth action handler.

nodes.name: menu.php
nodes.summary: Main navigation bar partial with active-view highlighting and links to all top-level views. Included on every page load.

nodes.name: donor_table.php
nodes.summary: Reusable DataTables-powered donor/member table component accepting rows, column definitions, footer totals, and a row click URL callable. Shared across all donor report views.

nodes.name: attestation_bulk.php
nodes.summary: Standalone script that generates a merged bulk donation attestation PDF for all qualifying donors in a year using pdftk. Requires login and has a 120s time limit.

nodes.name: attestation_don.php
nodes.summary: Standalone script that generates a single-member donation attestation PDF for a given user and year via pdftk. Requires login.

nodes.name: dt_defaults.js
nodes.summary: Shared DataTables configuration constants (DOM layout, export buttons, French language strings) reused by all views that initialize a DataTable.

nodes.name: member-general-form.js
nodes.summary: Alpine.js component for the member general-data inline edit form; sends PATCH requests to /api/members/{id} with only changed fields and handles CSP 'self' compliance.

nodes.name: custom.css
nodes.summary: Application-level CSS extending Bootstrap 5 with custom CSS variables (--ca-primary, --ca-danger, etc.) and component overrides for navbar, tables, and forms.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose stack defining three services: php (Apache/PHP 8.2 app on port 8080), mariadb:11 with health check, and adminer on port 8082.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Builds the PHP 8.2 Apache image with pdo_mysql extension, pdftk-java for PDF generation, and Apache modules (rewrite, headers, brotli).

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Developer convenience targets wrapping docker compose commands (up, down, logs, shell, db, import) and Playwright test runners (test, test-ui, test-reset-db).

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Node.js project manifest with a single devDependency on @playwright/test for E2E testing; exposes 'test' and 'test:ui' npm scripts.

nodes.name: playwright.config.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright configuration targeting localhost:8080, running tests sequentially on Chromium with pre-authenticated storage state and HTML/line reporters.

nodes.name: e2e.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions CI workflow that spins up the Docker test stack, resets the test database, installs Playwright, runs E2E tests, and uploads the HTML report on failure.

nodes.name: architecture.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive architecture reference covering request flows (htmx GET/POST PRG), 13 architectural layers, database schema with 10 tables, domain classes, auth system, API structure, frontend libraries, and code conventions.

nodes.name: api.md
nodes.summary: REST API reference documenting all endpoints for members, groups, compta, and suivi — including virtual filter values, request/response schemas, HTTP codes, and curl examples.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview and user-facing documentation covering features (members, groups, compta, PDF attestations, API), tech stack, project structure, installation wizard, and security setup including Fail2Ban.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Developer coding rules for AI-assisted development covering the dirty-form guard pattern (data-no-dirty, __dirtyOverride), htmx redirect conventions (HX-Location), and users.status filtering requirement.

nodes.name: DESIGN.md
nodes.summary: Design system specification with YAML frontmatter defining the full color palette, typography, spacing, and component tokens; body documents the 'clean admin' direction and Bootstrap 4→5 migration checklist.

nodes.name: PRODUCT.md
nodes.summary: Product context document defining user personas (1–5 internal staff, 4 roles), product purpose, brand personality (efficient/sober/professional), and design principles.

layers.name: Database / Schema
layers.description: MariaDB tables and the schema.sql definition that underpins all data persistence.

layers.name: Domain Classes
layers.description: PHP entity classes (User, Compta, Team, Metagroup, UserProperty) that encapsulate data access and business rules.

layers.name: Library / Bootstrap
layers.description: Shared PHP infrastructure: database connection, global utility functions, auth session management, and locale strings.

layers.name: REST API
layers.description: JSON REST API endpoints under /api/ for members, groups, compta, suivi, and compta-types.

layers.name: Routing
layers.description: Action and view dispatch routers: actions.php maps POST actions to handlers, views.php maps GET view names to templates.

layers.name: Action Handlers
layers.description: POST request handlers that validate input, orchestrate domain class operations, and write to the audit log.

layers.name: View Templates
layers.description: PHP view templates rendered into the main layout, covering member CRUD, donor reports, accounting, suivi, settings, and auth flows.

layers.name: Partials & Standalone
layers.description: Reusable page fragments (menu, donor_table) and standalone scripts (login, install, attestation PDFs).

layers.name: Frontend Assets
layers.description: Client-side JavaScript (Alpine.js components, DataTables config) and CSS design system.

layers.name: Infrastructure & CI
layers.description: Docker configuration, Makefile, and GitHub Actions CI workflow for local dev and automated E2E testing.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Architecture, API, product, and design documentation alongside developer conventions (CLAUDE.md).

tour.title: Start: entry point & request flow
tour.description: index.php is the single PHP front-controller. It bootstraps auth and class instances, then delegates to the action or view router depending on the request. Understanding this file shows how every page and htmx request is handled.

tour.title: Database schema
tour.description: schema.sql defines all 10 tables. Start here to understand the full data model: members, groups (team), properties, metagroups, accounting, app users, and audit logging.

tour.title: Core domain classes
tour.description: The five entity classes (User, Team, Compta, Metagroup, UserProperty) map directly to the schema tables. They handle all DB reads and writes. User is the most important — it has member CRUD and membership helpers.

tour.title: Bootstrap & auth infrastructure
tour.description: bootstrap.php sets up the PDO connection and global utilities. auth.php manages sessions, roles, and guards. Every PHP page includes bootstrap first.

tour.title: REST API layer
tour.description: Six API files under /api/ expose JSON endpoints consumed by the Alpine.js frontend and external integrations. _bootstrap.php is the shared API guard and error helper.

tour.title: Member list & edit views (most-used UI)
tour.description: users_list.php is the primary screen users see. users_edit_form.php is the tabbed profile editor. users_general_data.php implements the hover-to-edit Alpine.js pattern.

tour.title: Donor & accounting modules
tour.description: The donor views (donors_summary, donors_new, donors_loyal, donors_lapsed) provide year-over-year fundraising analytics. The compta views handle per-member accounting entries and attestation PDF generation.

tour.title: Settings & administration
tour.description: settings_general.php is the admin hub with tabs for groups, filters, accounting types, and app users. All administrative mutations go through action handlers that enforce role checks.
